title: Cyvispiria 32x
description: 1.8.9 Minecraft Resource Pack featuring vibrant colors and custom models for an enhanced parkour experience.
body:
Cyvispiria 32x is a 1.8.9 resource pack designed for all-purpose use. External assets where credit is due are credited in readme.txt inside the pack.

The pack contains many features for both enhanced appearance and visibility. It uses edited versions of textures from 1.14+ for certain blocks (netherrack, ice, etc) to improve visuals, as well as bordered ores for visibility.

Furthermore, the pack utilizes optifine to enhance the vibrance of biome colors, creating a colorful experience, as well as featuring thick-bordered items for a unique design feel.

Finally, the pack contains numerous custom models for quality and for utility. Notably, brewing stands and rails have full 3D models. It also modifies the visual hitbox for multiple blocks for accuracy.
(Explanation: certain blocks in-game have a collision different to their appearance. Notable examples of this are stairs and walls, which are 0.5 blocks taller than they appear. This texture pack modifies the model of these blocks to be more accurate to their actual collsion box.)
